commands.author: litang9
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a generated docs map, generation/check scripts, and package scripts wiring the map freshness check into docs validation.

PR surface: Docs +9613, Config +2, Other +223. Total +9838 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows the generated map starts with an H1 and the check script runs the writer before restoring the file. The broader docs-map request is a feature, not a runtime bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair remains clear: add metadata and make the freshness check non-mutating; the maintainer-only question is whether to keep the gate after that repair.

target.title: fix(reply): preserve usage footer across rollover
target.author: litang9

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
